blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,278 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
